title: Division 2 Tools Showcase
kicker: Showcasing tools used in the development of Tom Clancy's The Division 2
description: A technical-art case study focused on workflow tools, scripting support, and production iteration.

blocks.text: This project highlights the tools and techniques I used as a technical artist during the development of Tom Clancy's The Division 2, showcasing how I leveraged Snowdrop Engine capabilities to improve environment and gameplay production.
I used Snowdrop's node-based visual scripting for rapid gameplay prototyping and wrote Python automation scripts to streamline asset management and reduce repetitive team tasks.

blocks.alt: Division 2 tools project details placeholder image

blocks.text: Team feedback emphasized faster handoff quality and easier debugging during feature iteration, which helped increase consistency across content drops.
